instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Noah Ito and your zip code is 98187. You are logical, impatient. You just placed an order with two watches, you wan to change its address to your New York address (you don't want to reveal it but it's in your other order). You also want to modify the silicone watch to a metal one. If multiple colors available, you prefer white. For the air purifier you received along with sneakers, you want to exchange the purifier to large size and night mode, but still with HEPA filter. You like to say things in pieces.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: change its address to your New York address (you don't want to reveal it but it's in your other order)
dialogue_state.initial_query: Change the shipping address of my recent order to my New York address on file

hints.hint: The order is under the name Noah Ito

hints.segment: modify the silicone watch to a metal one
hints.hint: Update the silicone watch in the order to a metal one

hints.segment: exchange the air purifier to large size and night mode, but still with HEPA filter
hints.hint: Exchange the air purifier from my recent order for a large size with night mode, but still with HEPA filter

hints.segment: if multiple colors available, you prefer white
hints.hint: If there are multiple color options, choose white
